sourceFiles.treatment: Renamed and reduced to generic public material categories; removed internal reminders, fees, thresholds, systems, customer fields, and operational requirements.
Reimplemented list-to-numbered-text and checklist interaction as pure/static public UI; no DOM, export, history, storage, router, or original styling copied.

publicSafetyRules: No company names, personal names, phone numbers, account numbers, credit figures, fees, internal systems, file export, upload, chat, IndexedDB, backend clients, API keys, or local absolute paths.
All state remains in React memory except the separate language preference from the i18n layer.
The fixture is educational and must be re-reviewed before being treated as operational guidance.
